payload.label: microwave
payload.long_description: Partial view of a countertop microwave showing a black glass door with stainless-steel trim and reflective surface; interior cavity and metallic interior surfaces are visible through the window, and the bottom edge of the unit is cropped by the image frame; appears to be a small-to-mid sized microwave approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"microwave","short_description":"black-glass microwave door, bottom crop","long_description":"Partial view of a countertop microwave showing a black glass door with stainless-steel trim and reflective surface; interior cavity and metallic interior surfaces are visible through the window, and the bottom edge of the unit is cropped by the image frame; appears to be a small-to-mid sized microwave approximately 0.7 m from the camera.","attributes":["black glass door","stainless-steel trim","reflective surface","rectangular shape","interior cavity visible","edge-cropped (bottom)","countertop-sized"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.7}
